projects.name: Win95 & Blackberry Themed Portfolio Website
projects.description: A Blazor WebAssembly personal portfolio site with two interactive UIs: a retro Windows 95–style desktop for desktop browsers and a BlackBerry-style phone for mobile. Everything — copy, links, resume, projects, colors, OS names — is driven by JSON config files so the project is easy to fork and repurpose.

projects.name: Markdown Printer
projects.description: A desktop utility for printing Markdown files locally without uploading them to third-party services. Converts Markdown to a printable format entirely on-device, keeping your documents private.

projects.name: Reddit Saved Scalper
projects.description: A Selenium-powered bot that bulk-downloads media from Reddit's saved posts tab. Automates browsing and media extraction so you can archive your saved content without manual effort.
